scripts.qa:capture:ios: bash -lc 'CHECK=${npm_config_check:?Use --check=NN}; STATE=${npm_config_state:?Use --state=before|after}; DATE=${npm_config_date:-$(date +%F)}; OUT="qa-evidence/${DATE}/check-${CHECK}-ios-${STATE}.png"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$OUT")"; xcrun simctl io booted screenshot "$OUT"; echo "Saved screenshot: $OUT"'
scripts.qa:capture:android: bash -lc 'CHECK=${npm_config_check:?Use --check=NN}; STATE=${npm_config_state:?Use --state=before|after}; DATE=${npm_config_date:-$(date +%F)}; OUT="qa-evidence/${DATE}/check-${CHECK}-android-${STATE}.png"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$OUT")"; adb exec-out screencap -p > "$OUT"; echo "Saved screenshot: $OUT"'
